name_ja: グローバルユニチップ
layer_label_zh: ASIC 設計服務 · 台積電轉投資

price_target.kill_condition: If 2 named hyperscaler ASIC programs slip > 1 quarter or pivot to merchant silicon → revaluation thesis breaks. Cut half on first slip, exit on second.

A_ai_exposure.note: AI/HPC ASIC % of revenue — TSMC partnership + named hyperscaler programs

B_order_visibility.note: ASIC backlog disclosure + program milestones are the receipts

C_growth_potential.note: Custom silicon TAM expanding as hyperscalers diversify off NVDA — bottoms-up by program

D_cheap_to_fair.note: Need PT — peer Alchip 3661 already re-rated, GUC may be the relative-value play

E_increasing_moat.note: TSMC backing + advanced-node design service rare — N3/N2 design starts compounding

F_revaluation.note: Market still prices GUC as a TSMC subsidiary, not as a strategic AI silicon enabler

customers_named: [PENDING — confirm hyperscaler ASIC programs: AWS, Microsoft, Tesla Dojo, Google TPU partner roles]
order_visibility.capacity_locked: [PENDING — wafer commitments via TSMC for named programs]

receipts.summary_en: [PENDING — major ASIC program tape-out + production ramp announcement]
receipts.summary_zh: [PENDING — 重大 ASIC 案 tape-out + 量產時程]

receipts.summary_en: [PENDING — 法說會 on backlog + Q+N revenue visibility + tape-out cadence]
receipts.summary_zh: [PENDING — 法說會: 接單能見度 + tape-out 排程]

receipts.summary_en: [PENDING — TSMC N3/N2 design starts data + EDA tool spend signals]
receipts.summary_zh: [PENDING — 台積電先進製程 design starts]

order_visibility.kill: Loss of one named hyperscaler program to merchant silicon (NVDA / AMD) → cut half. Two losses → exit. Multiple compression vs Alchip persists > 6 months without margin step-up → re-evaluate revaluation thesis.

mechanism.en: [PENDING ≥600 words: Hyperscaler custom silicon strategy → ASIC partner selection (Alchip + GUC + Marvell + Broadcom) → wafer commitment via TSMC → revenue. GUC's TSMC backing = preferred N3/N2 access. Quantify program-level revenue trajectory.]

moat_widening.en: [PENDING: Advanced-node ASIC design service is a 4-firm market globally. TSMC's strategic interest in GUC = preferential capacity + IP access. Each design win compounds reference customer effects.]

revaluation_thesis.en: [PENDING: GUC trades at significant multiple discount to Alchip despite similar program quality. Discount unwinds as: (a) GUC programs reach mass production, (b) margins step up with NRE recognition shifting to royalty/turnkey, (c) market reframes from 'TSMC subsidiary' to 'AI silicon enabler'.]

kill_condition.en: Hyperscaler shifts custom silicon work in-house (Apple model). Or merchant silicon (NVDA, AMD) closes the cost-per-token gap, removing the ASIC rationale.

if_kill_then.en: Cut half on first major program loss. Exit on second. Move to substrate (3037) or test (2449) which are platform-agnostic to merchant-vs-ASIC mix.
